---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
images: profile.jpg.png
---

![](profile.jpg.PNG){fig-align="center" width="175" height="175"}

# Education

-   B.S., TOBB University of Economics and Technology, Turkey, 2015 - 2020.
-   M.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2026 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Employements

1.  The Union of Chambers and Commodity Exchanges of Turkey (TOBB) , year 2021-2023

2.  ASELSAN, EXPERT ENGINEER 2023- ongoing

## Internships

1.  Pfiffner Transformer, 2018

2.  HAVELSAN, 2019

3.  HAVELSAN, 2020

# Projects

1.  MAN, Multi-Model Mechanical Assembly Determination of Belt Pick-up Sequence for the Line, 2020

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python

# Hobbies

HANDICRAFTS ACTIVITIES

COOKING

BAKERY

You can download my CV by clicking [here.](cv.pdf)
